message:
fix(web): prevent memory leak in PullToRefresh spinner interval

Fixes a memory leak where the spinner rotation interval could continue
running after the PullToRefresh component unmounts if the refresh was
still in progress.

Changes:
- Add spinnerIntervalRef to track the interval ID across renders
- Add useEffect cleanup to clear interval on component unmount
- Store interval in ref instead of local variable for cleanup access
- Clear any existing interval before starting a new one
- Properly null out ref after clearing to prevent stale references

Before: If user navigated away during refresh, the setInterval would
continue running indefinitely, updating spring state on unmounted
component and leaking memory.

After: Cleanup effect ensures interval is always cleared, whether
the component unmounts during refresh or after completion.
